description: cargo test --lib compiler2:: -- --nocapture runs clean through the operator-wrapper/value-flow work until compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_keeps_tail_recursion_bounded, which aborts with stack overflow. This looks outside the current operator/type arc, but it is a real compiler2 failure that should be burned down separately.

comments.text: Current fz-rh2.18.9.5 dirty worktree includes a candidate fix: native back-edge annotation now treats CPS continuation edges as control-flow edges before JIT codegen. Before landing, either split that native change into fz-hn8's own ticket commit, or explicitly close fz-hn8 as fixed by the fz-rh2.18.9.5 commit if the batch intentionally retains it. Do not leave this bug as an unrelated ready item after the fix is verified.

title: Compiler2 native JIT tail recursion overflows stack
